<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
before = last_transition.before_frame
after = last_transition.after_frame

bseg = before.segmentation
aseg = after.segmentation

# Compare all non-background nodes
def summary(seg):
    result = {}
    for n in seg['nodes']:
        c = n['color']
        if c not in result:
            result[c] = []
        result[c].append((n['id'], n['pixels'], n['hash'))
    return result

print("Before:", summary(bseg))
print("After:", summary(aseg))

# Compare all non-background nodes
def summary(seg):
    result = {}

        c = n['color']
        if c not in result:

        result[c].append((n['id'], n['pixels'], n['hash'))
